name: Klara Patient Communication Platform API
what_it_does: Klara patient communication platform REST API for medical practices, specialty clinics, and health systems to automate patient messaging, appointment management, and care coordination through HIPAA-compliant two-way messaging. Enables AI agents to manage automated appointment reminders and confirmation for patient scheduling automation, handle two-way patient text messaging for practice communication workflow automation, access appointment intake form collection and pre-visit questionnaire for clinical intake automation, retrieve patient-reported symptom and outcome collection for care management automation, manage broadcast message campaigns to patient panels for preventive care outreach automation, handle insurance verification and copay collection messaging for practice revenue cycle automation, access staff team inbox and message routing for clinical communication triage automation, retrieve no-show follow-up and recall messaging for appointment utilization automation, manage post-visit care instruction delivery for patient education automation, and integrate Klara with EHR systems (primarily ModMed, Athenahealth, Kareo) for end-to-end patient communication workflow management.
use_cases: Sending appointment reminders from patient scheduling automation agents
Collecting intake forms from pre-visit workflow automation agents
Triggering post-visit instructions from care management agents
Managing patient message queues from practice communication agents
not_for: Emergency or urgent clinical messaging (use secure paging or EHR alerts)
Inpatient nurse call and rounding communication
Population health broadcast at scale (use health plan member communication platforms)
best_when: A medical practice, specialty clinic, or health system using ModMed or Athenahealth EHR wanting AI agents to automate patient appointment reminders, pre-visit intake, two-way messaging, and care coordination within Klara's patient communication platform.
avoid_when: HIPAA MINIMUM NECESSARY FOR PATIENT MESSAGING: Automated patient communication via Klara must apply HIPAA minimum necessary standard to PHI included in messages; automated messages that include more clinical detail than necessary for the communication purpose create HIPAA minimum necessary violation. TCPA PRIOR EXPRESS WRITTEN CONSENT FOR TEXT MESSAGING: Automated text message outreach via Klara requires TCPA prior express written consent from patients for commercial and marketing messages; appointment reminders qualify for healthcare treatment exception but automated wellness, marketing, or promotional messages require explicit written consent; automated text campaigns without verified TCPA consent creates class action exposure. MODMED ACQUISITION INTEGRATION DEPENDENCY: Klara was acquired by Modernizing Medicine (ModMed) in 2022; Klara's roadmap and API investment is now aligned with ModMed's EHR ecosystem; practices not using ModMed may see reduced feature parity and integration depth over time as Klara development prioritizes ModMed EHR integration.

auth.notes: Klara uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication depending on integration type. REST API with JSON. New York HQ (originally). Acquired by ModMed (Modernizing Medicine) in 2022. HIPAA-compliant two-way patient messaging. EHR integrations: ModMed (primary), Athenahealth, Kareo, and others. Specialty focus: dermatology, ophthalmology, orthopedics (aligned with ModMed specialty EHR focus). HIPAA Business Associate. Competes with Solutionreach, Luma Health, and Relatient for patient communication automation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-provider monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-provider monthly subscription; practice size and volume tiers; ModMed EHR bundle pricing for ModMed customers
pricing.notes: New York. ModMed subsidiary since 2022. Per-provider monthly subscription. ModMed bundle pricing. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; message and patient queries throttled; webhooks for message receipt and appointment events

known_agent_gotchas: MODMED EHR INTEGRATION DEPTH vs THIRD-PARTY EHR: Klara's deepest EHR integration is with ModMed; automated workflows that rely on bidirectional appointment status sync may have less reliable real-time sync for non-ModMed EHR integrations; verify integration depth with your specific EHR before designing automated appointment confirmation workflows that depend on EHR appointment status

PATIENT PHONE NUMBER VALIDATION FOR SMS DELIVERY: Klara automated messaging requires verified patient mobile number for SMS delivery; automated appointment reminder campaigns to landline or invalid mobile numbers create failed delivery without error surfacing; implement patient phone number type validation (mobile vs landline) before automated SMS campaign to reduce bounce rate

BROADCAST MESSAGE HEALTHCARE EXCEPTION SCOPE: Klara broadcast messaging for preventive care outreach (flu shot reminders, wellness screenings) qualifies for HIPAA healthcare operations; automated broadcast for non-treatment purposes (health system marketing, new service announcements) requires patient marketing authorization; automated broadcast campaign without message purpose classification creates HIPAA authorization requirement review

TEAM INBOX ROUTING CONFIGURATION FOR CLINICAL TRIAGE: Klara team inbox routes inbound patient messages to staff; automated message routing via Klara must maintain clinical oversight — automated responses to patient symptom messages without staff review creates unlicensed medical advice risk; implement human-in-the-loop for clinical symptom triage even in automated Klara workflows

INTAKE FORM SUBMISSION TIMING RELATIVE TO APPOINTMENT: Klara automated intake form delivery timing affects completion rate; forms sent too early (>48 hours) have lower completion than forms sent 24-48 hours before; automated intake workflow should trigger form delivery based on appointment time proximity, not appointment creation time; forms sent at appointment creation for appointments weeks away create low completion and re-send operational overhead
agent_readiness.security_notes: Patient communication. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Patient messages, appointment data, and clinical intake PHI.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient communication. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Patient messages, appointment, and clinical intake PHI.
